change_report.author: JP (Jean-Paul Lalonde) + Wren (Claude Opus 4.6)
change_report.summary: Initial build of Manifest AI Discovery App (M1-M3), cross-database standardization of all 3 BIOME Supabase projects, and new BIOME Engine Monitor app with AI-powered capability advisors.

created.name: Manifest AI Discovery App
created.purpose: Client intake layer for Manifest AI — 8 discovery templates that produce SSOT Field nodes

milestones_completed.name: Project Scaffold
milestones_completed.description: Vite + React 18 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS running locally with Solarpunk design tokens

milestones_completed.name: 8 Discovery Templates
milestones_completed.description: All 8 templates with 25 fields, local React state, navigation, progress tracking per template and overall

milestones_completed.name: Supabase Persistence
milestones_completed.description: Anonymous auth, auto-create project entity, debounced auto-save of field_nodes, data survives page refresh

source_files: src/App.tsx — BrowserRouter with DiscoveryProvider wrapping HomePage and TemplatePage routes

src/index.css — Tailwind v4 with full Solarpunk @theme tokens

created.name: BIOME Engine Monitor
created.purpose: Infrastructure health monitoring dashboard across all BIOME Supabase projects with educational context and AI-powered capability advisors

stack.backend: Supabase Edge Function (capability-advisor) on Manifest AI project
stack.ai: Claude Haiku 4.5 via Anthropic API (proxied through Edge Function)

capabilities_monitored.metric: Percentage of tables with RLS enabled

capabilities_monitored.name: RLS Policy Completeness
capabilities_monitored.metric: Tables with RLS enabled that have at least one policy

capabilities_monitored.name: Automatic Timestamp Triggers

capabilities_monitored.name: Data Volume

features: Live health checks across 3 Supabase projects via biome_health_check() RPC
Project summary cards with table count, row count, RLS coverage
9 capability cards grouped by category (Security, Data Integrity, Reliability, BIOME Standards)
Expandable educational context per capability: What is this?, Why it matters, Industry standard
AI-powered Section Chat per capability with contextual starter prompts and live health data
Dark mode toggle (Solarpunk Nightfall) with localStorage persistence
Refresh button to re-run all health checks
source_files: src/App.tsx — Main dashboard with health checks, dark mode toggle, category sections
src/main.tsx — React 18 entry point
src/index.css — Tailwind v4 with Solarpunk Daylight + Nightfall dark mode overrides
src/data/capabilities.ts — 9 capability definitions with descriptions, industry standards, evaluate functions
src/lib/supabase.ts — 3 Supabase clients (Manifest AI, BIOME Website, MyMantra)
src/lib/healthCheck.ts — fetchHealthCheck and fetchAllHealthChecks via RPC
src/components/CapabilityCard.tsx — Expandable card with health values, educational context, and SectionChat
src/components/SectionChat.tsx — Per-capability AI chat with starter prompts and conversation history
src/components/ProjectSummary.tsx — Project card with table/row/RLS summary
src/components/StatusBadge.tsx — Health status badge (healthy/warning/critical/unknown)

cross_project_standardization.description: Aligned all 3 BIOME Supabase projects to common infrastructure standards
standards_applied: UUID generation: gen_random_uuid() everywhere (native Postgres, no extension)
Audit log pattern: generic entity_id + entity_type + action (CHECK) + actor_id (UUID → auth.users) + before_data/after_data (JSONB) + reason
Timestamp naming: created_at and updated_at consistently
updated_at trigger: set_updated_at() BEFORE UPDATE function on all tables with updated_at
RLS: enabled on all tables across all projects

migrations_applied.name: standardize_uuid_and_add_updated_at_trigger
changes: Changed UUID defaults from extensions.uuid_generate_v4() to gen_random_uuid() on: entity_nodes, field_nodes, edges, canvas_chains, canvas_steps, audit_log
Added BEFORE UPDATE triggers on: entity_nodes, field_nodes, canvas_chains

migrations_applied.name: add_field_nodes_update_policy_and_upsert_constraint
changes: Added RLS UPDATE policy on field_nodes (was missing — could insert but not update)
Added UNIQUE constraint on field_nodes(entity_id, key) for safe upsert

migrations_applied.name: add_biome_health_check_function
changes: Created biome_health_check() SECURITY DEFINER function returning JSONB health metrics
Granted EXECUTE to anon role for browser RPC access

edge_functions_deployed.name: capability-advisor
edge_functions_deployed.purpose: Claude API proxy for per-capability AI advisor chats in BIOME Engine Monitor
edge_functions_deployed.pending_secret: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY — must be added via Supabase Dashboard → Edge Functions → Secrets

migrations_applied.name: standardize_audit_log_and_add_updated_at_trigger
changes: Dropped old scoped audit_log (submission_id FK, actor TEXT, occurred_at)
Created new BIOME-standard audit_log (entity_id, entity_type, action CHECK, actor_id UUID → auth.users, before_data/after_data JSONB, reason, created_at)
Added BEFORE UPDATE trigger on submissions

migrations_applied.name: add_audit_log_and_updated_at_triggers
changes: Created BIOME-standard audit_log table with RLS enabled
Added BEFORE UPDATE triggers on: beliefs, profiles, user_beliefs, synthesis_statements

pending_actions.action: Enable Anonymous Sign-ins on Manifest AI
pending_actions.location: Supabase Dashboard → Manifest AI → Authentication → Providers → Anonymous Sign-ins → ON
pending_actions.reason: Manifest Discovery App uses anonymous auth for persistence without requiring user login

pending_actions.action: Add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY secret to capability-advisor Edge Function
pending_actions.location: Supabase Dashboard → Manifest AI → Edge Functions → capability-advisor → Secrets
pending_actions.reason: Powers the AI capability advisors in BIOME Engine Monitor

pending_actions.action: RLS Policy Completeness is below 100% on all projects
pending_actions.detail: Manifest AI: 67%, BIOME Website: 75%, MyMantra: 86%. Some tables with RLS enabled may be missing INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE policies. This is a warning, not critical — the tables are locked down (RLS ON = deny by default), but some operations may silently fail.

architecture_decisions.decision: Anonymous auth for Manifest Discovery App
architecture_decisions.rationale: Removes login friction for discovery intake. Each browser gets a persistent Supabase identity. Can be upgraded to email/OAuth later without data migration.

architecture_decisions.decision: biome_health_check() as SECURITY DEFINER database function
architecture_decisions.rationale: Allows anon-key browser calls to query pg_catalog and information_schema. Function runs with definer privileges, not caller privileges. Avoids needing service role keys in the browser.

architecture_decisions.decision: Edge Function proxy for Claude API
architecture_decisions.rationale: Keeps ANTHROPIC_API_KEY server-side as a Supabase secret. Browser never sees the key. verify_jwt disabled because the monitor is an internal tool — can be tightened later.
Fast responses (~1s), low cost, sufficient quality for explanatory Q&A. Upgrade to Sonnet if deeper analysis is needed.
